name: @talocode/opensourcelane
description: Find, evaluate and plan migrations to open-source alternatives for expensive SaaS tools.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test:ci && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.test:ci: tsx --test tests/engine.test.ts tests/engine-extra.test.ts tests/catalog.test.ts tests/billing.test.ts tests/billing-failure.test.ts tests/client.test.ts tests/server.test.ts tests/cli.test.ts tests/package.test.ts tests/exports.test.ts tests/auth.test.ts
